tasks.title: Tour the Dashboard
tasks.description: Get to know your job tracking dashboard.
steps: View jobs that match your profile.
Click the sync jobs button to search top job.

tasks.title: Configure Preferences
tasks.description: Tell the Job Agent what you are looking for.
steps: Go to Settings in the menu.
Set your role, location, and job sites.
Update your target profile and scoring rubric.

tasks.title: Refine Search
tasks.description: Improve your automated job matching by refining keywords and goals.
steps: Enter a keyword or job title for your job searches.
Add information about your ideal job like goals, salary, and work environment.
